title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths Â· Execution Trace: Components
summary: Validate a deployment dependency plan and explain unreachable service routes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa components increment in a dependency analyzer with path evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Find connected components and explain what connectivity means for the modeled domain.
Analyze traversal over reachable vertices and represented edges with representation costs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
